action.reasoning: Observation: Best eval score 0.5768 with 86.67% success. Room maps only 80% success. Analysis: Key issues: 1) Skipping visited nodes prevents backtracking to reach new frontiers, 2) Increasing alpha in endgame is wrong - robot needs to travel farther when few frontiers remain, 3) Success rate is much more important than distance for score. Decision: Implement improved planner with: allow revisiting (visited_penalty), lower alpha, endgame strategy (lower alpha, no penalty), stuck detection. Test multiple configs on training maps.
